headline: Bond Yields Are Getting Slashed — These Dividend Stocks Are the Smarter Play Right Now
summary: Bond yields are one option for passive income investors, but they’re definitely not the only possibility. Sure, you can get a yield of around 4% from 10-year U.S. Treasury bonds, but you can probably achieve better returns with dividend-paying stocks. Bear in mind, you can get both share-price gains and dividend payments from some stocks. ... Bond Yields Are Getting Slashed — These Dividend Stocks Are the Smarter Play Right Now

headline: Lockheed Martin Weapons Ramp Up And Tech Projects Underpin Valuation Story
summary: Lockheed Martin is committing to increase advanced weapons production as U.S. and allied military operations intensify. Recent White House meetings and framework agreements focus on ramping up interceptor missile and missile defense system output. The company is expanding work on next generation anti jamming satellite payloads for Japan and collaborating on quantum machine learning research for defense applications. For investors watching NYSE:LMT, the news comes with the stock at a share...
